ping.response: Pong ! 🏓 Latency is {{messageLatency}}ms. API Latency is {{apiLatency}}ms. Bot Version {{appVersion}}

close.description: Close and archive a post (access restricted)

trackroles.description: Command to setup role update to track on the server.

paramsDescription.track: True to track the role, False to untrack it (default True)
paramsDescription.channel: Channel to log the role updates

embed.title: 🌍 Mod Ping — Timezone Subscription
embed.description:
Subscribe to your timezone group to receive <@&{{modPingRoleId}}> only during your active hours (8am → 2am local time).

Click a button below to toggle your timezone role.
You can select **multiple** groups if needed.

> Members with **no role selected** will receive Mod Ping **24/7**.

info.no_role: You have no timezone role selected. You will receive <@&{{modPingRoleId}}> mentions **24/7**.
info.active_roles:
🕐 Your **@Mod Ping** will be active during these hours:

{{schedules}}

response.role_added: ✅ Added **{{label}}** to your roles. You'll receive <@&{{modPingRoleId}}> during your active hours.
response.role_removed: ✅ Removed **{{label}}** from your roles. *Note that if you don't have any other active timezone roles, you will receive <@&{{modPingRoleId}}> 24/7.*
